_header: KNOWN-BAD FIXTURE (P1 capabilities). Disease: consumer-law gates firing on ubiquitous business language ('book a consultation', 'our customers') re-attached consumer law to B2B firms, including a real B2B fintech (caution.md C-058). This bundle is a B2B fintech with ZERO consumer transaction signals plus the exact trap phrases. Gate that must hold: facts/capabilities.js deriveCapabilities() must NEVER emit b2c present=true here; b2b_only must be present=true with verbatim evidence. Exercised on every run by facts/capabilities.test.js (fixture-driven tests). All names and domains are pseudonymous.

pages.title: Example Ledger | Treasury automation
pages.text: Example Ledger builds treasury automation software. Built for businesses that move money at scale. We work exclusively with companies and finance teams. Book a consultation with our team today. Our customers include mid-market finance departments across the UK.

pages.title: Platform
pages.text: The platform reconciles accounts payable and receivable in real time. Request a demo. Pricing is tailored to your organisation and agreed by annual contract.

pages.title: About
pages.text: We are a B2B payments infrastructure company serving finance teams. Our customers value straight-through processing. Book a consultation to learn more.

corpus.footerText: Example Ledger Ltd. Registered in England and Wales. Business customers only.
